name: USF Engine — Unified Simplicial Framework
description: Autopoietic simulation engine implementing Palatini–Einstein–Cartan (PEC) framework within a discrete simplicial complex, coupled with a FlyWire.ai connectome instantiated as per-neuron Markov blankets. Features 98% character recognition via injection-signature MLP, trigram sequence prediction, Active Inference feedback loop, and word-level language generation with temperature-controlled sampling. Built on Godot Engine 4.6.
